'''Galen Derlin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented [[Tiisheraan/Legends|Tiisheraan]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and was a close associate of [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]. After the rise of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Derlin resigned his post and withdrew from politics. He returned to his homeworld hoping to escape the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] corruption. His peace did not last long: Imperial operatives assassinated Derlin to demonstrate the reach of Palpatine.

Derlin's son, [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]], went on to become an important military and intelligence officer in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
